title: The Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
original_title: The Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
overview: In 1994 Nicole Brown Simpson and her friend Ronald Goldman were brutally murdered in her Los Angeles home by whom most believe to be O.J Simpson. But what role did Glen Rogers, also known as the Casanova Killer play in their death?
